news.headline: Tamil Nadu Proposes New Multi-Year Tariff Framework Until FY 2032
news.summary: The Tamil Nadu Electricity Regulatory Commission (TNERC) has released draft multi-year tariff (MYT) regulations for distribution licensees (DISCOMs) covering financial years (FYs) 2027-28 to 2031-32.

news.headline: HPERC Issues Draft Rules Defining Useful Life for Solar, Wind, Biomass Projects
news.summary: The Himachal Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission (HPERC) has issued the draft Promotion of Generation from the Renewable Energy Sources and Terms and Conditions for Tariff Determination (Eighth Amendment) Regulations, 2026, which seeks to add definitions of biomass and introduce new timefra

news.headline: Tamil Nadu Approves Procurement of 12 MW of Solar Power Under PM KUSUM
news.summary: The Tamil Nadu Electricity Regulatory Commission (TNERC) has approved tariffs in the range of ₹3.02 (~$0.0315)/kWh to ₹3.09 (~$0.0323)/kWh for the procurement of 12 MW of solar power under Component-A of the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM) program.

news.headline: NTPC Invites Bids for Repowering 5 MW Solar Project in Andaman
news.summary: NTPC has invited bids for an engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) package to repower its 5 MW NTPC Andaman solar project at Garacharma in Port Blair. The scope includes the supply, erection, testing, and inspection of equipment and materials at the manufacturer’s works; packing, suppl

news.headline: CleanMax’s Q4 Revenue Up 29% on Higher Renewable Energy Sales
news.summary: Clean energy solutions provider Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions’ income for the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY) 2026 rose 29.2% year-over-year (YoY) to ₹6.40 billion (~$66.90 million) from ₹4.95 billion (~$51.79 million).

news.headline: Fabric Manufacturer G.M. Syntex Saves ₹40 Million Annually by Going Solar
news.summary: Large commercial and industrial (C&I) consumers are increasingly turning to solar power to meet sustainability goals and reduce their electricity expenditure. news.headline: Daily News Wrap-Up: Solar Tenders and Auctions Drop in Q1 2026
news.summary: In the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, government agencies issued nearly 6 GW of solar tenders, a 68% year-over-year (YoY) decrease from 17 GW but almost double the capacity issued in Q4 2025. Although individual agency targets for FY 2025-26 have not yet been specified, the Ministry of New and Renew

news.headline: Sunrun Q1 2026 Revenue Rises 43%, Beats Analyst Estimates of $688 Million
news.summary: Listen to this article U.S.-based residential solar and battery storage provider Sunrun reported a revenue of $722.2 million in Q1 2026, increasing 43% year-over-year (YoY) from $504.3 million.
